arts.ttl: I won the Premier League with Chelsea and Leicester City but didn't deserve to with either
arts.sum: Former Chelsea and Leicester City goalkeeper Mark Schwarzer part of Premier League winning seasons at both of his former clubs, but he feels he didn't deserve it. A lot has changed for both clubs in the last nine years, with Chelsea last winning a Premier League title in 2017.

arts.ttl: How to watch Chelsea vs Leicester and why match isn't on live TV in UK
arts.sum: Leicester City are in desperate need of points, but a trip to Stamford Bridge to take on Chelsea on Sunday afternoon won't be easy, and unfortunately fans in the UK won't be able to watch on live TV

arts.ttl: Liverpool masterclass makes mockery of fresh Chelsea transfer decision affecting Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea do not currently plan on signing a new goalkeeper this summer but neither Filip Jorgensen nor Robert Sanchez currently look capable of holding down the throne for Enzo Maresca between the sticks
